positive: A minimalist, stylized geometric fox head silhouette, rendered in solid contrasting colors against a creamy off-white background. The fox design incorporates interlocking geometric shapes, evoking a sense of modern art and nature's elegance. Composition is centered and highly symmetrical. Use deep sapphire blues, burnt ochre, and charcoal greys for the colors. The style should mimic mid-century modern flat graphic design, perfect for apparel printing. Clean lines, sharp edges, and maximum visual impact for a t-shirt print.
